name: catwalk
hints: You made it to the catwalk! There's a locked door and a rope hanging down.
The locked door needs a key. E leads to the store room.
The rope hangs down to the ride below. D returns to the top of the ride.
E=store room (room 12) with the wrench. The locked door opens with the rusty key from the tank. This is a critical junction.
notes: Catwalk above the merry-go-round. Reached by jumping from top of ride with rope present. E=store room (12), D=top of ride (22). Locked door needs rusty key.
